---
title: "NeuralGraph.tsx"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/pennyone/vis/components/NeuralGraph.tsx"
loc: 159
complexity: 17
logic_score: 0.67
style_score: 3.74
intel_score: 5.52
overall_score: 3.04
---

## Intent
React component rendering NeuralGraph.

## Interaction Protocol
Include <NeuralGraph /> within a React-Three-Fiber Canvas context.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 0.7/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.5/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 226 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [useMemo](file://react)
- [useRef](file://react)
- [useState](file://react)
- [useEffect](file://react)
- [useCallback](file://react)
- [*](file://three)
- [useFrame](file://@react-three/fiber)
- [useThree](file://@react-three/fiber)
- [Html](file://@react-three/drei)
- [*](file://d3-force-3d)
- [*](file://gsap)
- [Node](file://../types/index.ts)
- [Link](file://../types/index.ts)
- [Trajectory](file://../types/index.ts)
- [GhostTrace](file://../types/index.ts)
- [NodeLayer](file://./NodeLayer.ts)
- [ConnectionLayer](file://./ConnectionLayer.ts)
- [FresnelAura](file://./AuraLayers.ts)
- [SelectionHighlight](file://./AuraLayers.ts)
- [TextLabel](file://./TextLabel.ts)
- [SelectionPanelShell](file://./SelectionPanelShell.ts)
- [GhostTraceLayer](file://./GhostTraceLayer.ts)
- [useNeuralData](file://../logic/useNeuralData.ts)
- [getStar](file://../logic/useNeuralData.ts)

### Exports
- `NeuralGraph`
- `NeuralGraph`
- `useThree`
- `simReady`
- `hovered`
- `selectedNode`
- `trajectories`
- `ghostTraces`
- `useNeuralData`
- `simulation`
- `i`
- `map`
- `protocol`
- `ws`
- `msg`
- `ping`
- `targetNode`
- `lastTrace`
- `newPoint`
- `handleNodeClick`
- `targetPos`
- `activeNodeIdFromHover`
- `activeNodeId`
